---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for VulnPredict
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "type: feature"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why they are less ideal.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario where this feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
